methods.name: ArchiveDirectory
methods.description: Pack files from the specified directory into a tar archive

params.name: --src
params.description: Path to the directory or data description for packing

params.name: --dest
params.description: Path to save the archive. To binary data if not filled

methods.name: UnarchiveDirectory
methods.description: Extract tar archive to the specified directory

params.name: --src
params.description: Path to the archive on disk or binary data

params.name: --dest
params.description: Directory path for unpacking. To binary data if not filled

methods.name: UnpackFiles
methods.description: Extract selected files from the tar archive by the list of paths

params.name: --src
params.description: Path to the archive on disk or binary data

params.name: --paths
params.description: Full paths of files inside the archive

params.name: --dest
params.description: Directory path for unpacking. To binary data if not filled

methods.name: ModifyArchive
methods.description: Add, replace and delete files in an existing tar archive

params.name: --src
params.description: Path to the archive on disk or binary data

params.name: --additions
params.description: Key: archive path; value: file path or binary data

params.name: --deletions
params.description: Paths of files in the archive for deletion

methods.name: GetArchivingSettingsStructure
methods.description: Gets a structure with additional data archiving settings

params.name: --empty
params.description: True > structure with empty valuse, False > field descriptions at values

params.name: --map
params.description: True > returns the filter fields as a map

methods.name: GetFilesList
methods.description: Gets a hierarchical list of files and directories in the archive

params.name: --src
params.description: Path to the archive on disk or binary data

methods.name: GetMetadata
methods.description: Gets metadata and a flat list of archive files

params.name: --src
params.description: Path to the archive on disk or binary data
